label: Silver Shield — Financial Bookkeeping Armor

sabbath.notes: No automated processing on Sundays. Manual review only.

dominion_notes: Silver Shield is the financial steward of the ecosystem. Fractal accounting engine: every entity (person, business, project, agent) gets its own books with double-entry ledger, multi-currency support (USD, XAG, MERIT, BTC, ETH), and append-only integrity. Resource tracker provides the merit ledger bridge -- other projects query balances and record spending through Silver Shield, not standalone JSON wallets. Bank statement pipeline (extraction, categorization, ledger building) is one tool within. Everything offline: Angular frontend + Flask backend on localhost only.

capabilities.core_engine: Four primitives (Entity, Account, Currency, Entry), append-only double-entry ledger, entity hierarchy with human authority constraint
capabilities.resource_tracking: Per-entity budgets, mint/allocate/spend, balance queries. The ecosystem merit ledger.
capabilities.merit_bridge: EZ Merit costs enforced per CI 40-703.7 (22/email, 22/smtp, 2/announcement, 10/confirmation). Balances derived from ledger, not separate wallets.
capabilities.bank_pipeline: PDF extraction (Centier, USAA, OCR), deposit categorization, Excel ledger builder
capabilities.compliance: CI 42 series (coverage, accuracy, formulas, sources, PII guard)

ecosystem_dependencies.ez-merit-notify: Merit spending interface -- reads balances from Silver Shield ledger
ecosystem_dependencies.auto-agent: Resource consumption recording, budget checks before proposals

checks: CI 42-001: Account coverage -- every configured account has extracted data
CI 42-003: Total accuracy -- deposit/withdrawal totals match statements
CI 42-004: Formula integrity -- Excel formulas recalc with 0 errors
CI 42-005: Parent debt sources -- all generic deposits flagged for review
CI 42-100: No PII -- repository contains no personal financial data

resource_policy.merit_authority: Only head of household mints. CI 40-703.2.
resource_policy.ledger_integrity: All merit balances derived from double-entry ledger. No standalone wallets.

data_policy: Config-driven paths, no PII in repository, .gitignore enforced. Claude Code PreToolUse hook blocks reading config.yaml, data/, output/, PDFs, Excel.
